content: Auto-update best practice for self-distributed apps: verify integrity via checksums/signatures before applying, serve update feed and payload over HTTPS, treat the update channel as an attack surface. Sparkle (macOS) is the de facto open-source standard framework: signs release archives with EdDSA (ed25519), can also sign the appcast/feed itself (SURequireSignedFeed) so release notes can't be tampered with, and never stores the private signing key in plaintext on disk.
